mapper.sql: acr.id,acr.employee_id as pe_id, acr.date, acr.clock_time, acr.card_machine_no, acr.attribute1, acr.attribute2, acr.attribute3, acr.attribute4, acr.attribute5, acr.update_by, acr.create_by, acr.update_time, acr.create_time

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.date as ${tAlias}_date, ${tAlias}.clock_time as ${tAlias}_clock_time, ${tAlias}.card_machine_no as ${tAlias}_card_machine_no, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time

select
,
,fdev.ext_dept_name AS pe_dept_name, fdev.ext_department_name AS pe_department, fdev.ext_team_name AS pe_team from
ac_fake_clock_record acr
ac_clock_record acr
join pm_employee pe on acr.employee_id = pe.id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 join pm_employee_job pej on pe.id = pej.employee_id and pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join fnd_dept_ext_v fdev on pej.dept_id = fdev.id and fdev.enabled_flag = 1 and fdev.deleted_flag = 0 where 1 = 1
mapper.update: update acr set employee_id = pe.id from [dbo].[ac_clock_record] acr join pm_employee pe on pe.work_card = acr.attribute1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and acr.employee_id = -1 and isnull(acr.attribute1, '') <> ''
mapper.insert: insert into ac_clock_record (id, employee_id, date, clock_time, card_machine_no, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, update_by, create_by, update_time, create_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{date,jdbcType=DATE}, #{clockTime,jdbcType=TIME}, #{cardMachineNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update ac_clock_record set employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, date = #{date,jdbcType=DATE}, clock_time = #{clockTime,jdbcType=TIME}, card_machine_no = #{cardMachineNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select case when exists (select 1 from ac_fake_record_setting afrs where afrs.enabled_flag = 1 and afrs.user_name = #{userName, jdbcType= VARCHAR}) then 1 else 0 end

select pe.id,pe.name, pe.work_card,
fdev.ext_dept_name as dept_name, fdev.ext_department_name as department_name, fdev.ext_team_name as team_name,acl.now_date , temp.min_clock_time, temp.max_clock_time, case when exists (select 1 from pm_employee_leaveoffice pel where pel.employee_id = pe.id and dateadd(dd, 1, convert(varchar(10), pel.quit_time, 120)) < acl.now_date) then 1 else 0 end as leave_flag, case when exists (select 1 from pm_employee_entry pee where pee.employee_id = pe.id and convert(varchar(10), pee.entry_time, 120) <= acl.now_date) then 1 else 0 end as work_flag, acl.day_off_flag as day_off_flag from ac_calendar_header ach join ac_calendar_line acl on ach.id = acl.calendar_header_id and ach.default_flag = 1 and acl.enabled_flag = 1 and acl.now_date between #{beginDate, jdbcType = DATE} and #{endDate, jdbcType = DATE} join pm_employee pe on pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.employee_type = '临时员工' join pm_employee_job pej on pe.id = pej.employee_id and pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join fnd_dept_ext_v fdev on pej.dept_id = fdev.id and fdev.enabled_flag = 1 and fdev.deleted_flag = 0 left join ( select t1.employee_id, t1.date, t1.min_clock_time, t2.max_clock_time from (select employee_id, date, min(clock_time) as min_clock_time from ac_clock_record acr where acr.date BETWEEN #{beginDate, jdbcType = DATE} and #{endDate, jdbcType = DATE} and EXISTS (select 1 from pm_employee pe where pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.id = acr.employee_id and pe.employee_type = '临时员工') GROUP BY employee_id, date) t1 left outer join (select employee_id, date, max(clock_time) as max_clock_time from ac_clock_record acr where acr.date BETWEEN #{beginDate, jdbcType = DATE} and #{endDate, jdbcType = DATE} and EXISTS (select 1 from pm_employee pe where pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.id = acr.employee_id and pe.employee_type = '临时员工') GROUP BY employee_id, date) t2 on t1.employee_id = t2.employee_id and t1.date = t2.date ) temp on temp.employee_id = pe.id and temp.date = acl.now_date where not EXISTS(select 1 from pm_employee_leaveoffice pel where pel.quit_time < #{beginDate, jdbcType = DATE} and pel.employee_id = pe.id and pel.enabled_flag = 1 ) and not exists (select 1 from pm_employee_entry pee where pee.entry_time > dateadd(dd, 1, #{endDate, jdbcType = DATE}) and pee.employee_id = pe.id and pee.enabled_flag = 1 ) order by pe.id, acl.now_date
